title: Resource Inventory, Delivery Evidence, Budgets, and Performance Boundaries · Stakeholder TypeScript Mission
summary: A municipal digital-services accessibility and content team. They need changed metadata, static WCAG-linked heuristics, stateful axe scans, manual review routes, resource budgets, and accessible evidence without search-ranking or conformance overclaims. Planned artifact: Deliver Inclusive Search, Accessibility, and Resource Auditor with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practic…
objectives: Resolve canonical links and reconcile redirects, sitemap URLs, internal links, content identity, and scope before reporting conflicts.
Map findings to WCAG 2.2 criteria, page states, severity rationale, affected users, and human verification without claiming automated conformance.
Scan initial, navigation, dialog, form error, authenticated, loading, empty, and changed responsive states reached through user actions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Project Canonical Signals
steps.instruction:
project case — A project TypeScript team handles case 8847 during an isolated browser, package, and restore smoke. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to reconcile resource graphs, size dimensions, cache context, budgets, and static-versus-user performance claims; URL, robots, body, parser, frontier, privacy, accessibility, and report budgets stay explicit; then reorder one frontier, p-limit, Promise, AbortSignal, stream, retry, checkpoint, or shutdown event and prove ownership. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Resolve canonical links and reconcile redirects, sitemap URLs, internal links, content identity, and scope before reporting conflicts.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Project Canonical Signals.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for resolve canonical links and reconcile redirects, sitemap urls, internal links, content identity, and scope before reporting conflicts.
